opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Spouse calling] He fell to the floor and started shaking violently about 10 minutes ago, and he hasn't stopped or opened his eyes once! Please help me, I don't know what to do.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Her husband collapsed and has been convulsing non-stop for over 10 minutes and will not wake up.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 10 minutes ago he suddenly fell to the floor
symptom_narrative.duration: the shaking has not stopped once in over 10 minutes
symptom_narrative.character: his whole body is jerking and stiffening violently, then going floppy, then jerking again
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it is terrifying, worse than any fit she has seen him have before, and he will not come round at all
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: continuous and unrelenting since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — she has tried talking to him and he does not respond
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps going on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: his lips have gone blue, his breathing sounds noisy and gurgly, he wet himself, and his jaw is clenched shut
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he has epilepsy and has had fits before, but they always stopped on their own within a minute or two and he came round afterwards — this one is completely different
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he is unconscious on the living room floor and cannot do anything for himself

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present at home and made the call; furniture has been pushed away so he is not hitting anything

objective_data_offered.value: whole-body violent jerking and stiffening, continuous; eyes not opening; jaw clamped shut
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over a phone/video call by a distressed bystander during an active convulsion

objective_data_offered.value: lips and around the mouth look blue; face looks sweaty
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour judged by eye on a phone camera, not a measured oxygen level

objective_data_offered.value: breathing sounds noisy, gurgly and irregular; he has been incontinent of urine
he ran out of his regular seizure tablets three days ago and has not taken any since
he is on the living room floor; furniture pushed clear; no obvious head injury seen
